themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "And if his offering for a sacrifice of peace offering unto the LORD be of the flock; male or...". Word-study detail reinforces "שְׁלָמִ֖ים: of peace offering - properly, requital, i.e., a (voluntary) sacrifice in thanks".
